findings.title: Direct URL fetch from user input
findings.description: User-supplied URL passed directly to libcurl fetch_remote without any validation

findings.title: Incomplete blocklist bypass in URL preview
findings.description: Preview handler uses strstr to check for localhost and 127.0.0.1 but allows other internal addresses and metadata IPs

findings.title: Webhook callback without re-validation
findings.description: Webhook test handler fetches stored callback URL via libcurl without re-validating the destination

findings.title: Metadata endpoint check bypassable via DNS rebinding
findings.description: Import handler uses strstr for 169.254 check on URL string but is bypassable via DNS rebinding or alternative hostnames

findings.title: Service proxy with arbitrary base_url fallback
findings.description: Proxy handler falls back to user-supplied base_url when service name is unrecognized, enabling arbitrary SSRF
